mapper.sql: person_id, name, gender, id_card, birth_date, ethnicity, phone, current_address, status, current_status_code, created_by_user_id, created_department_id, created_region_code, created_at, updated_at

choose.when: AND (p.created_by_user_id=#{scope.userId} OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId}))
AND (p.created_department_id=#{scope.departmentId} OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId}))
choose.otherwise: AND (SUBSTRING(p.created_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM residence r WHERE r.person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(r.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)))

mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM person p WHERE p.person_id=#{personId}
SELECT p.* FROM person p WHERE p.id_card=#{idCard}
SELECT p.* FROM person p ORDER BY p.person_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person
AND LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
AND id_card LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idCard}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE person SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, id_card = #{idCard}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, ethnicity = #{ethnicity}, phone = #{phone}, current_address = #{currentAddress}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE person_id = #{personId}
UPDATE person SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE person_id = #{personId}
